Objective: Verify successful SMS sending through API endpoint
Pre-conditions:
1. Valid API credentials
2. SMS plan with available credits
3. Test phone number
Test Steps:
1. Authenticate with valid API credentials
2. Call /messages/send-sms endpoint with valid payload
3. Include required parameters: to, from, body
4. Submit request
5. Verify response status
Expected Results:
1. API returns 200 status code
2. Response includes message_id
3. SMS is queued for delivery
4. Credits are deducted from account

Objective: Verify proper error handling when required fields are missing
Pre-conditions:
1. Valid API credentials
2. SMS plan active
Test Steps:
1. Authenticate with valid API credentials
2. Call /messages/send-sms endpoint
3. Omit 'to' field from payload
4. Submit request
5. Repeat with missing 'from' field
6. Repeat with missing 'body' field
Expected Results:
1. API returns 400 Bad Request
2. Error message clearly indicates missing field
3. No credits deducted
4. No message sent

Objective: Verify API properly validates authentication credentials
Pre-conditions: 1. Valid and invalid API credentials available
Test Steps:
1. Attempt API call without authentication header
2. Verify 401 Unauthorized response
3. Attempt API call with invalid API key
4. Verify 401 Unauthorized response
5. Use valid credentials
6. Verify 200 success response
Expected Results:
1. Unauthenticated requests rejected with 401
2. Invalid credentials rejected with 401
3. Error messages don't leak sensitive info
4. Valid credentials allow access

Objective: Verify API response times meet SLA requirements
Pre-conditions:
1. SMS plan with credits
2. Performance testing tools
Test Steps:
1. Send 10 SMS API requests sequentially
2. Measure response time for each
3. Calculate average response time
4. Send 5 concurrent requests
5. Measure concurrent response times
Expected Results:
1. Average response time < 500ms
2. 95th percentile < 1000ms
3. Concurrent requests handled properly
4. No timeouts or failures

Objective: Verify SMS changes didn't break existing email functionality
Pre-conditions:
1. Valid email API credentials
2. Email plan active
Test Steps:
1. Authenticate with valid credentials
2. Send test email via /messages/send endpoint
3. Verify email delivery
4. Check email rendering
5. Verify tracking works
Expected Results:
1. Email sends successfully
2. Email renders correctly
3. Tracking pixels work
4. No regression in email functionality

Objective: Verify SMS dashboard displays correctly in Chrome browser
Pre-conditions:
1. Chrome browser (latest version)
2. SMS plan active
3. SMS usage data
Test Steps:
1. Open Chrome browser
2. Navigate to /sms/dashboard
3. Verify page layout loads correctly
4. Check SMS usage meter displays
5. Verify credit information shows
6. Test responsive behavior
Expected Results:
1. Dashboard loads without errors
2. SMS meter displays accurately
3. All UI elements properly positioned
4. Responsive layout works correctly
5. No console errors

Objective: Verify warning appears when SMS credits run low
Pre-conditions: 1. SMS plan with less than 10% credits remaining
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to SMS dashboard
2. Check for low credit warning banner
3. Verify warning message is clear
4. Click upgrade/add credits button
5. Verify proper navigation
Expected Results:
1. Warning banner displays prominently
2. Message clearly indicates low credits
3. Call-to-action button works
4. User can easily add more credits
